data.title: Greeks.live: Traders are closely watching Bitcoin's potential recovery towards the $120,000 level
data.description: Adam, a macro researcher at Greeks.live, published an English community briefing, stating: "Community sentiment is mixed, with some traders selling call options around current levels to take profits, but remaining cautiously optimistic. The focus remains on BTC, with traders closely watching Bitcoin's potential recovery to $120,000, while IBIT +10 basis points suggests potential strength, posing a challenge to short positions."

data.title: Mega Matrix Files $2 Billion Registration Statement to Advance Stablecoin Governance Token Strategy
data.description: Mega Matrix, a company listed on the New York American Stock Exchange, announced that it has filed a general shelf registration statement (Form F-3) with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) to raise $2 billion to support its stablecoin governance token (DAT) strategy, with the goal of building the world's largest stablecoin governance token company. Last week, the company announced that Ethena's governance token, $ENA, would be the primary target of its DAT strategy. Once the registration statement becomes effective, the company will have the flexibility to issue up to $2 billion in Class A common stock, preferred stock, bonds, warrants, or a combination thereof, to systematically accumulate the governance tokens of leading stablecoins. (PRNewswire)

data.title: Bitwise Expands Cryptocurrency Offerings on Six Swiss Exchange
data.description: According to Foresight News, digital asset management firm Bitwise has launched five new cryptocurrency exchange-traded products (ETPs) on the Six Swiss Exchange. The newly listed ETPs include Bitwise Core Bitcoin ETP, Bitwise Ethereum Staking ETP, Bitwise Solana Staking ETP, Bitwise Physical XRP ETP, and Bitwise MSCI Digital Assets Select 20 ETP. With these additions, Bitwise now offers a total of ten cryptocurrency ETPs on the Six Swiss Exchange.

data.title: Trend Research has transferred one-third of the total NEIROETH to the exchange today
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ember, Trend Research has transferred one-third of its total NEIROETH to exchanges today. In addition to continuing to transfer NEIROETH to Bybit, they have also begun transferring NEIROETH to Gate. They have already transferred nearly half of their holdings to exchanges today: Previously, they held a total of 670 million NEIROETH (67% of the total), and today they have transferred 324.7 million NEIROETH (worth $22 million) to exchanges. On-chain addresses still hold 34.6% of the total NEIROETH (346 million, valued at $23.16 million).

data.title: Crypto infrastructure provider Fireblocks launches stablecoin payments network
data.description: Crypto infrastructure provider Fireblocks announced the launch of the Fireblocks Network for Payments, a stablecoin payment network designed to help crypto and financial companies more easily transfer stablecoins. The network has attracted over 40 participating institutions, including Bridge, a stablecoin startup acquired by Stripe; stablecoin companies Zerohash and Yellow Card; and Circle, which recently completed its IPO. (Fortune)

data.title: BitFuFu: 408 BTC mined in August, Bitcoin holdings increased to 1,899
data.description: Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company BitFuFu released an unaudited production and mining operations update for August 2025, revealing that the company mined 408 BTC last month (353 BTC from cloud mining and 55 BTC from self-mining). Its Bitcoin holdings have increased to 1,899, an increase of 115 BTC from July 31, 2025. (Globenewswire)

data.title: Stuttgart Stock Exchange Launches Blockchain-Based Settlement Platform
data.description: According to Foresight News, the Stuttgart Stock Exchange has introduced a blockchain-based pan-European settlement platform named Seturion. This initiative aims to streamline the fragmented post-trade systems for tokenized assets and reduce settlement costs by up to 90%. The platform is accessible to banks, brokers, traditional and digital exchanges, as well as tokenization platforms. It is currently operational on the BX Digital platform, which is regulated by the Swiss Financial Market Supervisory Authority (FINMA) and utilizes distributed ledger technology (DLT).

data.title: Trump's second son: American Bitcoin will soon release several important announcements
data.description: Eric Trump, the second son of Trump, posted on the X platform that American Bitcoin Company is just getting started and will soon release several important announcements.

data.title: RedStone acquires DeFi credit rating platform Credora
data.description: RedStone, a blockchain data oracle service provider, announced the acquisition of Credora, a DeFi credit rating platform, for an undisclosed amount. Credora has previously received investments from institutions such as Coinbase Ventures, S&P, and Hashkey. Following the acquisition, Credora will continue to operate under the "Credora by RedStone" brand, focusing on providing rating services for DeFi assets and yield strategies. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Robot Consulting Co. Ltd. Plans Ethereum Investment to Enhance Legal Tech and Metaverse Expansion
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Japanese platform service provider Robot Consulting Co., Ltd., listed on NASDAQ under the code LAWR, has announced plans to expand into the legal technology and metaverse sectors. As part of its long-term strategy, the company intends to invest some of its available cash resources, potentially including funds raised from its initial public offering completed on July 18, 2025, into Ethereum (ETH).

The investment aims to integrate blockchain technology with legal tech projects and establish a digital asset reserve. Robot Consulting Co. Ltd. expects to commence this investment between the fourth quarter of 2025 and spring 2026. The planned investment amount is estimated to be up to 1 billion yen (approximately 6.73 million USD), although the exact timing and amount may be adjusted based on market conditions and strategic considerations.

The company will conduct quarterly market valuations of its Ethereum holdings and include any gains or losses in its annual financial statements. If the amounts are significant, they will be promptly disclosed to investors.

data.title: Revolut Initiates Share Buyback to Maintain Private Status
data.description:
According to Foresight News, British fintech company Revolut has launched its first share buyback offer, allowing it to repurchase up to 10% of shares from qualified investors. Sources familiar with the matter indicated that Revolut is prioritizing early investors in this offer, with the aim of maintaining its private status for a longer period.

This initiative complements Revolut's secondary stock offering plan, which began on Monday. The plan permits existing employees to sell up to 20% of their shares to both new and existing supporters. Additionally, Revolut is in discussions with firms like Greenoaks Capital to raise new funds.

The company is also exploring ways to expand its presence in the United States. This includes considering applying for a full banking license or acquiring an existing bank with its own license.

data.title: GameSquare: 15,731.07 ETH as of the end of August
data.description: Nasdaq-listed GameSquare released its monthly earnings report, revealing it held 15,731.07 ETH as of August 31st. Based on a price of $4,391.91, the value of its ETH holdings is approximately $69,089,444. GameSquare clarified that its ETH holdings and earnings figures do not include other on-chain assets, including the company's NFT portfolio, which had a cost basis of approximately $7.15 million at the end of August. (Prnewswire)

data.title: Nasdaq-listed CIMG and Merlin Chain launch $55 million Bitcoin treasury
data.description: Nasdaq-listed CIMG Inc. (Nasdaq: IMG) announced a strategic partnership with Merlin Chain to launch a $55 million Bitcoin treasury. The first 500 BTC will be on-chain and earn interest through Merlin Chain's Institutional HODL+ platform. This is the industry's first on-chain Bitcoin treasury pilot initiated by a listed company, highlighting the accelerating financialization of Bitcoin and providing a compliant, secure, and sustainable BTCfi path for enterprise treasuries.

data.title: The number of initial jobless claims in the United States for the week ending August 30 was 237,000, while the expected number was 230,000.
data.description: The number of initial jobless claims in the United States for the week ended August 30 was 237,000, compared to expectations of 230,000 and the previous reading of 229,000. (Jinshi)

data.title: The U.S. SEC released its Spring 2025 regulatory agenda, covering potential rule proposals related to the issuance and sale of crypto assets.
data.description: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has released its Spring 2025 Regulatory Agenda, which includes potential rule proposals related to the issuance and sale of crypto-assets. The agenda aims to help clarify the regulatory framework for crypto-assets and provide greater certainty to the market. SEC Chairman Paul S. Atkins stated that a key priority during his tenure as chairman will be to clarify the rules governing the issuance, custody, and trading of crypto-assets while continuing to deter bad actors from violating the law. The report also covers a series of proposed deregulatory rules designed to reduce compliance burdens and promote capital formation, including streamlining financing and investor access to private companies. The report also discusses revising existing rules to make them more comprehensive and modernized, and addressing disclosure burdens.

data.title: Trend Research deposited another 134 million NEIRO tokens to Bybit from three addresses
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi's monitoring, Trend Research is still continuing to reduce its holdings, and has transferred a total of US$18.09 million worth of NEIRO to the exchange today. In the past 10 minutes, three addresses of Trend Research have recharged 134 million NEIRO worth US$8.24 million to Bybit.

data.title: SUN tokens completed the 46th repurchase and destruction
data.description: According to an official announcement, the 46th SUN token buyback and burn has been completed, with a total of 1,654,767 SUN tokens destroyed. The execution period is from August 7 to September 4, 2025. Since the buyback program was launched in December 2021, the total amount of SUN tokens destroyed in the ecosystem has exceeded 641 million, of which 355 million were completed through SunSwap V2 revenue and 285 million were achieved through SunPump revenue.

data.title: Nasdaq Intensifies Scrutiny of Cryptocurrency Investments by Listed Companies
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Nasdaq is increasing its scrutiny of cryptocurrency investments by its listed companies. This move comes after some companies have raised funds to purchase crypto assets, aiming to boost their stock performance. Nasdaq has expressed concern over this practice, citing potential risks of misleading investors, and has decided to enhance regulatory measures.

While specific regulatory actions have not been publicly disclosed, Nasdaq is expected to require companies to provide detailed information about their cryptocurrency investments, including the scale, strategy, and potential risks involved. Additionally, companies that frequently engage in crypto asset trading may face special examinations to ensure compliance with market standards.

This initiative reflects the growing attention of regulatory bodies on the cryptocurrency market, aiming to protect investor interests and maintain market order. Investors are advised to pay close attention to announcements and disclosures from relevant companies and carefully assess the risks associated with their investment activities.

data.title: Before the ADP release, the probability of a September rate cut by the Federal Reserve was 97.6%.
data.description: According to CME's "Fed Watch," the probability of the Fed keeping interest rates unchanged in September is 2.4%, and the probability of a 25 basis point rate cut is 97.6%. The probability of the Fed keeping interest rates unchanged in October is 1.1%, the probability of a cumulative 25 basis point rate cut is 46.7%, and the probability of a cumulative 50 basis point rate cut is 52.1%.

data.title: The ADP number of "small non-farm payrolls" was lower than expected, and the US dollar index DXY fell 10 points in the short term
data.description: The U.S. ADP employment report for August showed an increase of 54,000, below market expectations of a 65,000 increase. The "small non-farm payrolls" figure was also lower than expected. The U.S. dollar index (DXY) fell 10 points in the short term, but quickly recovered and is now at 98.24. (Jinshi)
